description.text: A bloodbath on Valentine's Day. What could be more romantic? One Cube and a Base.

ru.original: A bloodbath on Valentine's Day. What could be more romantic? One Cube and a Base.
ru.translation: Резня в День святого Валентина. Что может быть романтичнее? Два куба и база.

es.original: A bloodbath on Valentine's Day. What could be more romantic? One Cube and a Base.
es.translation:
Un escenario romántico y bélico para el día de San Valentín.
Un generador y un núcleo.

de.original: A bloodbath on Valentine's Day. What could be more romantic? One Cube and a Base.
de.translation: Ein Blutbad am Valentinstag. Was könnte romantischer sein? Ein Generator und eine Basis.

pt.original: A bloodbath on Valentine's Day. What could be more romantic? One Cube and a Base.
pt.translation: Um banho de sangue no Dia de São Valentim. O que poderia ser mais romântico? Um Cubo e uma Base.

fr.original: A bloodbath on Valentine's Day. What could be more romantic? One Cube and a Base.
fr.translation: Rien de plus romantique qu'un bain de sang pour la Saint-Valentin ! Un cube et une base.
